incidents.title: Payment service timeout spike
incidents.root_cause: Retry handler removed in PR #892, causing immediate failures on transient errors

incidents.title: Database migration deadlock
incidents.error_message: Deadlock detected between migration and active queries
incidents.root_cause: Schema change in models/user.py without proper locking strategy

incidents.title: Memory leak in payment retry loop
incidents.error_message: Memory usage climbed from 512MB to 2.8GB over 30 minutes
incidents.root_cause: Retry handler not releasing connection objects properly

incidents.title: Payment processing failures during peak traffic
incidents.root_cause: Insufficient retry logic for transient network failures

incidents.title: Authentication bypass via hardcoded token
incidents.error_message: Hardcoded API key found in code, exposed in logs
incidents.root_cause: Developer left debug token in production code

incidents.title: Silent error handling swallows critical failures
incidents.error_message: Exceptions caught but not logged, causing blind spot in monitoring
incidents.root_cause: Broad except clause without logging in payment service

incidents.title: Cache invalidation failure
incidents.error_message: Stale data served for 30 minutes after update
incidents.root_cause: Cache TTL logic removed during refactor

incidents.title: Deployment during peak traffic Friday evening
incidents.root_cause: Deployed at 4:50 PM on Friday without proper validation
